news.headline: Wealth, drugs and rape: US luxury real estate stars convicted of sex trafficking
news.summary:
Three brothers, including two of America’s most successful luxury real estate brokers, were convicted of sex trafficking charges on Monday after a five-week trial over accusations that they used drugs and force to rape scores of women they had dazzled with their wealth and opulent lifestyle.

news.headline: Trump threatens to hit Iran harder if it blocks energy supplies
news.summary: US President Donald Trump threatened to escalate attacks on Iran if it disrupted global oil supplies.

news.headline: Could foreign judges give China’s legal system the expertise to go global?
news.summary:
China should bring in judges from overseas and expand arbitration pilot programmes to extend the international reach of its legal system, according to a former senior justice official.

news.headline: High-profile real estate brothers convicted in sex trafficking case
news.summary: Prosecutors accused the brothers of using their wealth to lure women to parties and luxury homes, then taking advantage of them.

news.headline: Iran Choosing Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader Signals Defiance Amid War
news.summary: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei could prove to be even more radical than his father and predecessor, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed by the U.S. and Israel at the start of the war.
